_meta.description: Golden regression dataset for ALdeci ML model validation

cases.title: Log4Shell - Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution
cases.notes: Most exploited vulnerability in 2021-2022. Full RCE via JNDI lookup. Must be top priority.

cases.title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack (DoS)
cases.notes: Mass-exploited HTTP/2 DoS. High EPSS, in KEV. Affects most web servers.

cases.title: XZ Utils Backdoor (Supply Chain)
cases.notes: Supply chain backdoor in xz-utils 5.6.0/5.6.1. Affects sshd authentication bypass.

cases.title: MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection
cases.notes: Cl0p ransomware gang mass-exploited. SQLi leading to RCE. KEV listed.

cases.title: Microsoft Exchange Server SSRF (ProxyLogon)
cases.notes: ProxyLogon: HAFNIUM APT. Pre-auth SSRF chain to RCE.

cases.title: Atlassian Confluence Broken Access Control
cases.notes: Unauthenticated admin account creation. Nation-state exploitation.

cases.title: Ivanti Connect Secure Command Injection
cases.notes: VPN gateway command injection. Mass exploitation, CISA emergency directive.

cases.title: Citrix NetScaler/ADC Buffer Overflow (Citrix Bleed)
cases.notes: Session token leak. LockBit ransomware exploitation. Citrix Bleed.

cases.title: VMware vCenter Server RCE
cases.notes: File upload leading to RCE. vSphere Client unauthenticated.

cases.title: PHP CGI Argument Injection
cases.notes: PHP-CGI argument injection. CVE-2012-1823 bypass on Windows.

cases.title: GoAnywhere MFT Pre-Auth RCE
cases.notes: Cl0p ransomware mass exploitation. Java deserialization via admin console.

cases.title: FortiManager Missing Authentication
cases.notes: FortiJump: Missing auth on FGFM protocol. UNC5820 APT exploitation.

cases.title: OpenSSH regreSSHion Race Condition
cases.notes: Signal handler race condition in OpenSSH. PoC exists but exploitation is complex.

cases.title: curl SOCKS5 Heap Buffer Overflow
cases.notes: SOCKS5 proxy heap overflow in curl. High CVSS but low EPSS, requires SOCKS5 proxy, not reachable.

cases.title: Microsoft Office RCE via HTML
cases.notes: Storm-0978 APT exploitation. Office HTML RCE but internal network reduces exposure.

cases.title: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Privilege Escalation
cases.notes: ~50K+ devices compromised. Unauthenticated admin account creation.

cases.title: Barracuda ESG Command Injection
cases.notes: UNC4841 APT exploitation. Tar file parsing command injection.

cases.title: Jenkins CLI Path Traversal RCE
cases.notes: Jenkins CLI arbitrary file read → RCE. Usually internal but high-value CI/CD target.

cases.title: Windows OLE RCE via Outlook
cases.notes: Preview pane RCE in Outlook. High CVSS but PoC only, internal assets.

cases.title: GoAnywhere MFT Auth Bypass
cases.notes: Path traversal authentication bypass to create admin user.

cases.title: Fortinet FortiOS SSL-VPN Heap Overflow
cases.notes: Pre-auth RCE in FortiOS SSL-VPN. Volt Typhoon APT exploitation.

cases.title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Auth Bypass
cases.notes: Trivial auth bypass. Mass exploitation within 24h of disclosure.

cases.title: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile Auth Bypass
cases.notes: Mobile device management bypass. Internal MDM, moderate criticality.

cases.title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset (Internal Load Balancer)
cases.notes: Same CVE as GR-002 but on internal non-reachable LB. Context reduces priority.

cases.title: Spring4Shell (Internal Microservice)
cases.notes: Critical CVE but on low-criticality internal service, not reachable. Context should reduce priority massively.

cases.title: Openfire Path Traversal Auth Bypass
cases.notes: XMPP chat server auth bypass. Partner network, moderate asset.

cases.title: Apache HTTP Server Request Smuggling
cases.notes: High CVSS but very low EPSS, no exploit, no KEV. Theoretical risk.

cases.title: Fortinet FortiOS Out-of-bound Write
cases.notes: Critical FortiOS vuln but on partner-network-only asset with moderate criticality.

cases.title: F5 BIG-IP Configuration Utility Auth Bypass
cases.notes: BIG-IP TMUI auth bypass. High-value but internal only.

cases.title: JetBrains TeamCity Auth Bypass
cases.notes: CI/CD server auth bypass. Cozy Bear APT. High-value but internal.

cases.title: zlib Integer Overflow (MiniZip)
cases.notes: CVSS 9.8 but EPSS 0.003. No exploit, not reachable, low-value asset. Classic false-alarm.

cases.title: OpenSSL DH Key Checking DoS
cases.notes: Low-impact OpenSSL DoS. Negligible EPSS. Noise.

cases.title: BusyBox Shell Ash Integer Overflow
cases.notes: Container base image vuln. Not reachable, no exploit, trivial asset.

cases.title: ncurses Memory Corruption
cases.notes: Library-level vuln in ncurses. Local-only, no network vector, no exploit.

cases.title: Python urllib URL Parsing Issue
cases.notes: URL parsing issue in Python stdlib. Very low EPSS. Impact depends heavily on application.

cases.title: OpenLDAP SQL Injection (component not present)
cases.notes: Scanner false positive — affected component not actually present. Asset criticality 0.

cases.title: Protobuf.js Prototype Pollution (patched version)
cases.notes: Already patched. Scanner detected old metadata. Asset criticality 0 for patched.

cases.title: OpenSSL NULL Pointer DoS (mitigated by WAF)
cases.notes: Already mitigated by WAF rule. Not reachable after mitigation. Criticality 0.

cases.title: PostgreSQL SQL Injection (unused extension)
cases.notes: Affected extension not installed/used. Asset criticality 0.

cases.title: Envoy HTTP/2 Header Flood (not deployed)
cases.notes: Envoy not deployed in this environment. Scanner detected in dependency tree only.

cases.title: Ivanti SSRF + CVE-2024-21887 Command Injection Chain
cases.notes: SSRF chained with command injection for full RCE. Chain exploit increases risk beyond individual CVE.

cases.title: Exchange SSRF → Deserialization Chain (ProxyLogon p2)
cases.notes: Part of ProxyLogon chain. Individual CVSS 7.8 but chain enables full compromise.

cases.title: Exchange ProxyShell SSRF → Escalation → RCE
cases.notes: ProxyShell: 3-CVE chain for unauthenticated RCE. Massively exploited.

cases.title: Ivanti Connect Secure Auth Bypass → RCE Chain
cases.notes: Auth bypass → command injection chain. UNC5221 APT exploitation.

cases.title: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization → Path Traversal Chain
cases.notes: Deserialization chained with path traversal for ACL bypass. Actively exploited.

cases.title: Juniper Junos OS PHP Injection (Time-Based Blind)
cases.notes: Edge case: Time-based blind exploitation. MPTE verification needs specialized detection.

cases.title: Confluence Improper Authorization (Delayed Exploitation)
cases.notes: Edge case: Exploitation started weeks after CVE publication. Delayed weaponization.

cases.title: AMD Zen 2 Zenbleed CPU Side-Channel
cases.notes: Edge case: Hardware CPU vuln. Requires local code execution. Unusual attack vector.

cases.title: OpenSSH Agent Forwarding RCE
cases.notes: Edge case: Requires ssh-agent forwarding to be enabled AND a malicious server. Complex preconditions.

cases.title: Palo Alto PAN-OS GlobalProtect Command Injection
cases.notes: Edge case: Zero-day in network security appliance. UTA0218 APT. Critical because it's the security boundary itself.

cases.title: XZ Utils Backdoor (Supply Chain Attack)
cases.notes: Supply chain backdoor in xz/liblzma 5.6.0/5.6.1. Sophisticated nation-state attack. Must be P0.

cases.title: Fortinet FortiOS Out-of-Bounds Write RCE
cases.notes: Mass-exploited Fortinet VPN RCE. In CISA KEV. Critical for perimeter devices.

cases.title: FortiManager Missing Authentication (FortiJump)
cases.notes: FortiJump — mass exploitation since Oct 2024. CISA KEV, UNC5820 threat group.

cases.title: PHP CGI Argument Injection (Windows)
cases.notes: PHP-CGI argument injection on Windows. Widely exploited in 2024.

cases.title: Jenkins Arbitrary File Read via CLI
cases.notes: Jenkins CLI arbitrary file read. Internal but critical CI/CD asset.

cases.title: OpenSSH regreSSHion Race Condition RCE
cases.notes: regreSSHion — OpenSSH race condition. High impact but hard to exploit reliably.

cases.title: util-linux wall Command Injection (WallEscape)
cases.notes: WallEscape — local exploitation only. Medium severity, internal asset.

cases.title: Windows OLE RCE via Outlook Preview
cases.notes: High CVSS but no confirmed exploit. Internal asset. EPSS relatively low.

cases.title: BeyondTrust PRA/RS Command Injection
cases.notes: Critical CVE but low asset criticality and not reachable. Should deprioritize.

cases.title: False Positive - Disputed CVE with no exploit
cases.notes: Synthetic CVE. Very low criticality but non-zero EPSS puts it just above FP threshold. P4 is correct.

cases.title: Ivanti Connect Secure Auth Bypass + RCE Chain
cases.notes: Ivanti chain exploit — auth bypass + command injection. Mass-exploited.

cases.title: Palo Alto PAN-OS Auth Bypass + Privilege Escalation Chain
cases.notes: PAN-OS operation LUNAR PEEK — auth bypass + priv escalation chain.

cases.title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Authentication Bypass
cases.notes: ScreenConnect auth bypass. CVSS 10 but partner-network asset (lower criticality).

cases.title: Ivanti Connect Secure Stack Buffer Overflow
cases.notes: Jan 2025 Ivanti zero-day. Mass-exploited by UNC5337. In KEV.

cases.title: Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom File Upload RCE
cases.notes: Cleo MFT exploit — Cl0p ransomware group. MOVEit successor attack.

cases.title: ElementsKit Elementor Addons RCE (CVSS 10.0)
cases.notes: WordPress plugin RCE, CVSS 10.0, actively exploited. Internet-facing CMS.

cases.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Auth Bypass
cases.notes: Cisco SD-WAN auth bypass in KEV. Critical infrastructure, internet-facing.

cases.title: Soliton FileZen OS Command Injection
cases.notes: FileZen OS command injection, in KEV but partner-facing, medium asset criticality.

cases.title: Google Chrome CSS Use-After-Free
cases.notes: Chrome UAF, KEV listed, weaponized. But affects endpoints not servers — medium criticality.

cases.title: BeyondTrust PRA/RS OS Command Injection (2026)
cases.notes: BeyondTrust remote access command injection. KEV, weaponized, critical infra.

cases.title: Apple Multiple Products Buffer Overflow
cases.notes: Apple buffer overflow, KEV listed. Endpoint vuln, not server-side — lower asset criticality.

cases.title: TOTOLINK Router Argument Injection RCE
cases.notes: IoT router vuln, high CVSS but low asset criticality, internal only, unreachable.

cases.title: Keycloak Cross-Realm Token Acceptance Bypass
cases.notes: Keycloak auth bypass. Affects cloud-native identity infra. High asset criticality.

cases.title: Notepad++ Download Without Integrity Check
cases.notes: Developer tool supply chain risk, KEV but very low asset criticality, not reachable.

cases.title: Microsoft Configuration Manager SQL Injection
cases.notes: SCCM SQL injection. KEV, weaponized. Internal but high-value IT management asset.

cases.title: JetBrains TeamCity Authentication Bypass
cases.notes: Critical CVE but low asset criticality and internal-only unreachable. Demonstrates that even weaponized CVEs get deprioritized when asset context is low.

cases.title: Microsoft Outlook Moniker Link RCE
cases.notes: Critical Outlook RCE but on dev-only mail server, not reachable from internet. Low priority despite high CVSS.

cases.title: util-linux wall Command Escape Sequence Injection
cases.notes: Informational finding, no security impact in containerized environment. False positive.

cases.title: Windows OLE Remote Code Execution (Patched)
cases.notes: High CVSS but no exploit, not in KEV, internal only. Low urgency.

cases.title: Ivanti Connect Secure Local Privilege Escalation
cases.notes: Local privesc on isolated non-critical asset. Model correctly classifies as FP-level risk.

cases.title: ncurses Memory Corruption (Duplicate/Disputed)
cases.notes: Disputed CVE, zero CVSS, no exploit. Scanner noise — should be filtered.

cases.title: Cleo File Transfer Arbitrary File Upload (Chained)
cases.notes: Actively exploited file transfer vulnerability. Part of Cl0p ransomware campaign. Chain exploit with initial access.

cases.title: Apache Struts File Upload Path Traversal
cases.notes: Critical Struts vuln but internal-only, medium criticality. PoC exists but not weaponized.

cases.title: Golang x/crypto/ssh Authorization Bypass
cases.notes: Medium Go SSH vuln, very low criticality internal service, no exploit. FP-level risk.

cases.title: Apache OFBiz Screen Rendering Code Execution
cases.notes: Actively exploited OFBiz RCE. High priority but not quite P0 due to 0.7 asset criticality.

cases.title: BentoML safe_extract_tarfile Path Traversal to RCE
cases.notes: BentoML path traversal in tar extraction. PoC available. Relevant to ML serving pipelines.

cases.title: Authlib JWT alg:none Authentication Bypass
cases.notes: JWT alg:none bypass in Authlib. Relevant to any Python app using JWT auth. ALdeci uses JWT.

cases.title: LangGraph SQLite Checkpoint Insecure Deserialization
cases.notes: SQLite checkpoint deserialization in LangGraph. ALdeci uses SQLite but not LangGraph.

cases.title: joserfc JOSE Resource Exhaustion DoS
cases.notes: JOSE resource exhaustion DoS. Adjacent to JWT implementations.

cases.title: IDExpert Windows Logon Agent RCE via Arbitrary File Download
cases.notes: Unauthenticated RCE via arbitrary file download. Critical CVSS 9.8.

cases.title: U-Office Force Insecure Deserialization RCE
cases.notes: Insecure deserialization → RCE. Unauthenticated. Fresh 2026 CVE. Adjusted: EPSS 0.004 + PoC maturity → P1 not P0 despite CVSS 9.8.

cases.title: Python-Markdown HTMLParser AssertionError DoS
cases.notes: Edge case: DoS via malformed HTML in Markdown parser. Low exploitability, no direct security impact. Adjusted: Low severity, no exploit → P3 not P4.

cases.title: Mesa ABM Benchmark CI/CD Code Checkout (Research Context Only)
cases.notes: False positive test: High CVSS but zero asset criticality, no exposure, not reachable. Model should score very low. Adjusted: Zero-criticality but nonzero exposure score → P4 not FP.
